title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log into their account. They have tried resetting their password but still cannot access the portal.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using VISA card ending 1234 but the transaction failed. Need to investigate payment gateway.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their invoice from the billing section. The download button is not functioning properly.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address is showing incorrectly. They updated it but it still displays the old one.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon launching on their device.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but gets an error. Upload feature is not working.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer wants to disable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle is not working properly.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but didn't receive a confirmation email even though payment succeeded.

title: Account Locked After Multiple Login Attempts
description: Customer's account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts. They need assistance to unlock it.

title: Email Notifications Not Working
description: Customer is not receiving any email notifications for important updates and alerts from the system.

title: Dashboard Loading Very Slowly
description: The main dashboard takes more than 30 seconds to load. Customer is experiencing significant performance issues.

title: Unable to Cancel Subscription
description: Customer wants to cancel their subscription but the cancel button is grayed out and not clickable.

title: Export Data Feature Not Working
description: Customer is trying to export their data to CSV format but keeps getting an error message.

title: Phone Number Verification Failed
description: Customer cannot verify their phone number. The verification code expires before they can enter it.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Customer received a password reset email but the link shows as expired even though it was just sent.

title: Dark Mode Toggle Not Saving
description: Customer enables dark mode but the setting doesn't save. Every time they log back in, it resets to light mode.

title: File Upload Size Limit Error
description: Customer is trying to upload a document but keeps getting a size limit error even though the file is within the allowed size.

title: Integration with Third-Party App Broken
description: The integration with Google Calendar stopped working after the last update. Events are not syncing anymore.

title: Search Function Returns No Results
description: Customer is searching for specific items but the search always returns zero results even though the items exist.

title: Notification Sound Not Playing
description: Customer has enabled notification sounds but no audio plays when new notifications arrive.

title: Mobile App Not Syncing with Web Version
description: Changes made on the mobile app are not reflecting on the web version and vice versa. Data sync is broken.

title: Discount Code Not Applying at Checkout
description: Customer entered a valid discount code but it shows as invalid. The code should be active until the end of the month.

title: Calendar View Showing Wrong Time Zone
description: All scheduled items in the calendar are showing in UTC instead of the customer's local time zone setting.

title: Unable to Delete Old Files
description: Customer is trying to delete old files to free up storage space but the delete button does nothing.

title: API Key Generation Failing
description: Developer customer cannot generate a new API key. The system shows a server error whenever they try.

title: Report Export Contains Wrong Data
description: Monthly report export is showing data from the previous month instead of the current month's data.

title: Privacy Settings Keep Resetting
description: Customer changes their privacy settings but they keep reverting to default after a few hours.

title: Video Tutorial Links Are Broken
description: All video tutorial links in the help section are showing 404 errors. Customer needs access to learning materials.
